register_snapshot.title: Register of Members' Financial Interests as at 13 Jul 2026
register_snapshot.retention_notice: Interests remain in the Register for twelve months after the interest has ended.

included: Official UK Parliament Registered Interests page for member ID 185
All pagination pages needed to capture the displayed current snapshot
Official UK Parliament register publications index used to identify the 13 July 2026 register version
excluded: Companies House and other company registries
News reporting, party, campaign and personal websites, social media, Wikipedia and aggregators
Legality, propriety, influence, motive, benefit or political-significance inference

sources.title: Register of Interests for Jeremy Corbyn
sources.limitations: Captures the current published member snapshot only. The page states that interests remain in the Register for twelve months after an interest has ended; it is not a complete historical register.

coverage_gaps.summary: The 13 July 2026 current published register snapshot is captured, but earlier register versions and interests outside the current twelve-month retention display have not been collected.
coverage_gaps.next_action: Open a separately authorised historical-register lane if complete longitudinal financial-interest coverage is required.
coverage_gaps.notes: The current snapshot is complete at capture time; the section remains partial because the official current page is not a complete historical record.

decisions.notes: The current published snapshot is fully captured at the declared time. Complete historical coverage is not claimed, and no entry is reclassified into another canonical section.
